a193-1.description: 02-periodic-checks.sh has p95=30043ms (30 seconds!) with avg=3037ms and is DEGRADING. This is 5x worse than the E prehook that was just optimized.
a193-1.resolution: RESOLVED. s1766 (wq-842) added timeout guards: 10s per-check hard timeout, 12s overall watchdog, per-check JSONL telemetry. avg dropped from 3037ms → 1537ms (49% reduction). P95 still shows 30043ms but this is a stale historical data point — the timeout cap prevents future spikes above 12s. Trend now 'improving'. Root cause identified in BRAINSTORMING.md: sequential account-manager.mjs test --all (51 platforms × 8s timeout worst case). Brainstorming item for Promise.allSettled parallelization would structurally fix it.
a193-1.metric_after: p95=30043ms (stale) avg=1537ms trend=improving. 12s hard cap prevents future spikes.

a193-2.description: MoltStack auth failure in s1764 — POST endpoints return 401 while GET endpoints work.
a193-2.resolution: RESOLVED. s1767 (wq-843) verified MoltStack auth working (POST /api/posts returns 200). Updated account-registry.json status to 'live' with note that s1764 failure was transient. Added MoltStack to engage-blockers.sh platform coverage. s1769 had no MoltStack skip — picker didn't select it but auth is confirmed functional.
a193-2.metric_after: MoltStack POST 200, status=live, auth confirmed working. s1769 had zero platform skips.

active.title: Automate platform credential lifecycle
active.progress: ON-TRACK but tight. Credential health check shipped (s1734). 6 platforms batch-registered (s1735). Clawsta/ClawNews auth diagnosed (s1744). E prehook integrated with credential-health-check.mjs (s1746). Circuit breaker extracted (s1751). DI added to orchestrator handlers (s1740, s1755). E prehook optimized (s1759). MoltStack re-authed (s1767). Engage-blockers expanded to 11 platforms (s1767). Last 2 E sessions (s1757, s1769) had 0 platform skips = zero credential-related E session failures.
active.strategic_fit: HIGH. Credential failures down from 3 E sessions affected (s1742, s1752, s1764) to 0 (s1757, s1769). d072 is delivering measurable impact.
active.pace_assessment: 36 sessions in, 4 remaining. Core infrastructure complete. Remaining deliverables: auto-refresh for expiring tokens, credential backup/recovery. Auto-refresh is the priority — without it, credentials will fail again when tokens expire. 4 sessions is tight but feasible for 1-2 deliverables.
active.verdict: ON-TRACK. Core goal (zero credential-related E failures) being met in recent sessions. Should prioritize auto-refresh before deadline.

recommended_actions.description: 36-circuit-reset.sh is the only degrading hook (p95=5170ms, avg=1928ms). All other degrading hooks from A#193 are now improving or stable. Profile this hook to identify what's causing the degradation — likely circuit-breaker state file reads scaling with entries.
